name: domain-provider-pattern
description: DomainProvider creates MST stores from domain definitions (teams, multiTenancy, chat). Stores auto-load persisted data via useEffect on mount. Components access stores via useDomains() hook destructuring: const { chat } = useDomains().
relevantCode: const domains = { teams: teamsDomain, chat: chatDomain } as const
recommendation: Unified page should use useDomains() to access chat store for session management. May need to add platform-features domain.
